steps.title: Spot the core action
steps.content:
The passage opens with recently discovered and structures itself around reporting this find: what was discovered (a thermopolium with food remains, artworks, decorations), why it matters to researchers (understanding daily life in Pompeii), and an example (the ceramic jar).

The passage's central purpose is presenting an archaeological discovery.

steps.title: Match the purpose to the correct choice
steps.content:
The passage's main purpose is presenting a recent archaeological discovery—exactly what choice C states.

The other three focus on topics absent from the text (political systems, climate) or mischaracterize what's being described (ancient art comparisons).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
